scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.check: concurrently "npm run check:client" "npm run check:server" "npm run format:check"
scripts.check:server: cd server && npx tsc --noEmit && npx eslint .
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd client && npx eslint src/" "cd server && npx eslint ."
scripts.lint:fix: cd client && npx eslint src/ --fix && cd ../server && npx eslint . --fix
